transcript: Please welcome you up with Green Tea. When I do the chin stand, there was a line of tape on the stage where I was supposed to turn and my neck got stuck on the tape and it like gave me a big brush burn. So I have scars all over my chin. And I am fragile. And I am weak. If you wanted to, you could break me. Thank you.

timestamps.text: Please welcome you up with Green Tea. When I do the chin stand, there was a line of tape on the stage
where I was supposed to turn and my neck got stuck on the tape
and it like gave me a big brush burn.
So I have scars all over my chin. And I am fragile.
If you wanted to, you could break me. Thank you.
